privileged_info_summary: The task requires duplicating the 'Q2 Financial Review' event (scheduled for Monday 10:00-11:30 with attendees Alice Johnson, Bob Williams, Henry Kim, originally in 'Conference Room A') to create 'Q3 Financial Review' scheduled exactly 14 days later at the same time (10:00-11:30), with location changed to 'Board Room', adding Grace Patel as a fourth attendee, and description containing keywords 'Q3', 'financial performance', and 'forecasting'. The original Q2 event must remain unchanged. All required attendees (Alice Johnson, Bob Williams, Henry Kim, Grace Patel), location, and keywords are synthetically created within the Odoo scheduling environment and verified by the automated verifier.
